title: The Story of the Last Chrysanthemum
writer: Matsutarô Kawaguchi, Shôfû Muramatsu, Yoshikata Yoda
actors: Shôtarô Hanayagi, Kôkichi Takada, Ryôtarô Kawanami
plot: The adopted son of a legendary actor, and an aspiring star himself, turns to his infant brother's wet nurse for support and affection - only for her to give up everything for her beloved's glory.
